overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Death Stranding) showing a character with large cargo traversing a narrow, foggy mountain ridge. The character ascends through heavy mist, pauses at a peak to survey the landscape, then continues along the rocky precipice as the fog gradually clears to reveal vast mountainous terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep mountain ridge in dense fog

events.description: fog begins to lift and visibility gradually improves

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a narrow rocky ridge through dense fog, carefully navigating the steep terrain

entered.detail: narrow rocky path forming the mountain ridge being traversed
thick white fog obscuring distant views
steep rocky cliff dropping off to the left
steep rocky cliff dropping off to the right

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep, narrow mountain ridge enveloped in dense fog. Visibility is limited to the immediate rocky path ahead, with steep drops visible on both sides. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with the fog beginning to clear slightly as the character progresses upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit with emerging panoramic views

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the mountain peak
fog clears significantly revealing vast mountain ranges in the distance

agents.ego_description: standing still at the mountain summit, looking around at the landscape as the fog clears

entered.detail: vast valley view opening up as fog clears
layered mountain peaks visible through the clearing mist

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the mountain summit as the fog dramatically clears, revealing breathtaking panoramic views of distant mountain ranges and valleys. The camera pans slightly to capture the expansive landscape emerging from the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain ridge with steep precipices

events.description: character resumes walking along the narrow ridge

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow rocky ridge with vast drops on either side

segments.scene_description: The character continues the journey along the narrow mountain ridge, with the fog now lifted to reveal the full grandeur of the surrounding peaks and valleys. The path remains treacherous with steep drops visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: high mountain ridge with distant structures visible

events.description: tall distant tower structure becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain path with expansive views of the valley and distant landmarks

entered.detail: tall thin tower structure visible on the distant horizon
wide valley floor visible far below the ridge

segments.scene_description: The final stretch reveals an expansive vista with a distant tower structure appearing on the horizon. The character continues along the high ridge with the vast mountainous terrain stretching out in all directions, the path winding toward the distant landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a treacherous mountain ridge that transforms from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded ascent into a vast, open panoramic vista. It begins with the character climbing a steep, narrow path enveloped in dense mist, where dim lighting and limited visibility emphasize the steep drops on either side. As the character reaches the summit, the fog dramatically clears, and the camera pans to reveal breathtaking views of distant mountain ranges and deep valleys emerging from the haze. The scene then expands as the character continues along the rocky precipice under a clear sky, with the full grandeur of the surrounding peaks now fully visible. Finally, the perspective opens further to reveal a distant tower structure on the horizon, with the winding path leading toward the landmark across an expansive mountainous terrain.
